remember: Students will be able to recall and list the elements of a speech
Students will be able to identify the different types of speeches
Students will be able to explain the importance of speech writing
understand: Students will be able to comprehend the purpose and structure of a speech
Students will be able to analyze the role of the speaker in a speech
Students will be able to recognize the impact of tone and language in a speech
apply: Students will be able to write a speech using the elements and structure
Students will be able to use persuasive techniques in a speech
Students will be able to adapt the tone and language according to the audience
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of a speech
Students will be able to compare and contrast different speeches
Students will be able to evaluate the use of language and tone in a speech

ncert_objectives: To understand the elements of a speech
To learn the different types of speeches
To comprehend the purpose and structure of a speech
To appreciate the role of the speaker in a speech
To recognize the impact of tone and language in a speech
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to write a speech on a given topic
Students will be able to demonstrate the ability to persuade and convince the audience
Students will be able to use language and tone effectively in a speech
